channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Aave Token Falls Near 2-Year Low as Risk Management Firm Becomes Latest to Depart
item.description: Decentralized lending giant Aave's native token fell near a 2-year-low price following news that another ecosystem contributor is leaving.

item.title: FDIC Reveals Proposed Rules for Stablecoin Issuers Under GENIUS Act
item.description: The FDIC’s proposal establishes federal oversight standards for stablecoin issuers while explicitly excluding tokens from deposit insurance protections.

item.title: Bitcoin rises past $69,000 as risk markets reverse big early losses on hope for Iran deal
item.description: Iran's government is reportedly reviewing Pakistan's request for a two-week ceasefire positively, according to an Axios report.

item.title: Bitcoin Threatens to Break Support as Trump Threatens to Destroy Iran
item.description: Trump threatened to erase an entire civilization by tonight, and markets—including Bitcoin—are predictably on edge.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETF inflows top $471M but BTC is pinned under $70K: Here’s why
item.description: Bitcoin ETF inflows hit $471 million, but stress on digital asset treasuries, selling from miners, and the war in Iran are keeping BTC stuck below $70,000.

item.title: Americans lost $11B to crypto scams in 2025, says FBI
item.description: According to the bureau, a large number of minors aged 17 and younger were included in complaints related to crypto or crypto ATMs, resulting in more than $5 million in losses.

item.title: 'Captive Audience' Could Drive Demand for Morgan Stanley's Bitcoin ETF: Bloomberg Analyst
item.description: Morgan Stanley is joining the Bitcoin ETF party late, but Bloomberg's Eric Balchunas says the investment bank isn't showing up empty-handed.

item.title: Fifth Element Star Milla Jovovich Reveals AI Memory Tool MemPalace
item.description: The Fifth Element and Resident Evil star reveals an AI project inspired by the ancient “memory palace” method.

item.title: Stablecoin issuers get closer to U.S. federal rules with FDIC's new proposal
item.description: The Federal Deposit Insurance Corp. approved a proposed rule to govern the issuers, even as the Senate continues to debate GENIUS Act details.

item.title: Solana Foundation to Help Secure DeFi Protocols Following $285 Million Drift Hack
item.description: The Solana Foundation will offer tiered security services to DeFi protocols, marking a shift toward institutionalized protection following the Drift exploit.

item.title: Trump-linked World Liberty faces scrutiny over ties to sanctioned network: The Times
item.description: A deal with an Asia-based blockchain project followed recent links to individuals later sanctioned over alleged ties to a major fraud network

item.title: Bitcoin holds $67K support as data exposes price to sentiment divergence
item.description: Wintermute analysts said Bitcoin’s price stability against the extreme bearish sentiment present in the market is a positive. Will BTC ever flip $70,000 back to support?

item.title: ‘Don’t waste time with crypto': Here is what Solana Foundation's cryptic message really means
item.description: The foundation says it is becoming a leading network for “agentic payments.”

item.title: i can spot a grifter from miles away. so i digged into the code to figure out if this is legit or not. guess i was right. ben is a crypto founder who runs some weird bitcoin lending platform, i was pretty sure he knows absolutely nothing about ai and memory so i tracke - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBLQUtDS1hhdTBaUFRjb2haVmxfY1FGdDJnSGlybExSeEd0X0pzVm95em1ZVS05SC1GcE16alJNYnpRWVo2VzlhYTlBU05Rc1pCNDd4MFc0d2pBUy1qc0x4M2ZTaFQ?oc=5" target="_blank">i can spot a grifter from miles…

item.title: US prosecutors reject Tornado Cash co-founder‘s argument for dismissal
item.description: Roman Storm, the co-founder of the crypto mixing service, still faces a possible retrial on two charges after a jury failed to reach a verdict in 2025.

item.title: DeFi yields are crashing so hard that they can't compete with a traditional savings account
item.description: DeFi yields have collapsed below TradFi rates, forcing investors to face higher smart contract risks for lower returns as regulation and exploits mount.

item.title: Phone Logs Show Seven Calls Between Milei and LIBRA Backer on Launch Night: Report
item.description: New evidence from Argentina's federal probe into LIBRA complicates Milei's claim he had no ties to the meme coin.

item.title: Americans’ losses to crypto scams rose to over $11 billion last year, FBI reports
item.description: Fraud schemes grew more sophisticated and targeted larger sums than in 2024.

item.title: Regulation by hostility: the real legacy of Biden-era crypto policy
item.description: Thorn argues that a recent New York Times op-ed rewrites history through omission, glossing over the collateral damage caused by the previous administration.

item.title: XRP ETFs Outpace Bitcoin as Crypto Funds Bounce Back After Down Week
item.description: Bitcoin usually drives investment action around crypto ETFs, but last week, XRP led as overall crypto fund flows flipped positive.

item.title: Split Capital winds down as founder joins stablecoin startup Plasma
item.description: Split Capital founder Zaheer Ebtikar is closing his crypto hedge fund after strong returns to join Plasma as chief strategy officer, citing a major industry shift.

item.title: CME Set to Launch Avalanche, Sui Futures Ahead of 24/7 Crypto Derivatives Trading Shift
item.description: CME Group is adding to its list of crypto derivatives contracts, expanding to include Avalanche and Sui in early May.

item.title: JUST IN: Morgan Stanley's spot Bitcoin ETF to begin trading tomorrow. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBYZzdIYmRXdjRoaEgtcU5vQnVSZDV3X2VDRFpUYnlKYWxhMTJzdWxOMFJXODBma3hZY0pLUzlHbFFaN1FjbzFZbzQ5UXJaaG9DS2ZwazJIcWFuelpZMEp3dGNB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Morgan Stanley's spot Bit…

item.title: Schwab says even a 1% crypto allocation can reshape portfolio risk
item.description: The brokerage's research finds that even a tiny crypto allocation can dominate your portfolio's risk, suggesting that the "right" amount to own depends entirely on your stomach for 70% price swings.

item.title: Grayscale says bitcoin's quantum problem is governance, not engineering
item.description: The asset manager's research arm argues the technical path to quantum-safe blockchains is clear but reaching consensus on protocol changes, especially what to do with Satoshi's coins, is the real obstacle.

item.title: Polymarket bags 97% of onchain prediction market fees after pricing overhaul
item.description: Polymarket has become one of decentralized finance’s highest fee-generating protocols, pulling in about $7.1 million in fees in the first week of the second quarter.

item.title: Bitcoin waits at $68K as hours tick down to Iran deadline
item.description: Bitcoin and risk-asset price action tried to brush off new US-Iran war rhetoric just hours before the deadline for a deal passed.

item.title: CME Group expands crypto futures with Avalanche and Sui contracts
item.description: CME Group said it will launch Avalanche and Sui futures contracts pending regulatory approval, as it expands its regulated crypto product offering.

item.title: BREAKING: Morgan Stanley's spot Bitcoin ETF to go live tomorrow — Bloomberg's Eric Balchunas 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5vUW1lSUR1M2NXdVNNeTZhakpqVXBiRHdiSGpzZWlDbzVnVTFraVN1LTcwaDd0djVzdHBwcW5XbHhVRlRpWFdlcWU5T0lDdnY3dWlpLTMtSlh6YjB1M1BNaFEyQzJVV1k?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Morgan Stanley's …

item.title: Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF $MBST going effective tomorrow looks like, Wed 4/8, via NYSE listing notice. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1od1pBWGo3ZktBTjcxd0J5bm9UN3BEWFRjUzF6ZXlHZmlpZndFZ2gxU1g3STVDQk9nZWRNOHRPQTV0aUh6M2FFcFlrRThIS2daTjQzN3F3UmhGeWpZbzMxYkt0S0k?oc=5" target="_blank">Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF $MBS…

item.title: Bitcoin price risks '$15K shakeout' in the next 5 months, BTC analyst warns
item.description: Multiple Bitcoin indicators, including a bull-bear sentiment index and realized price metric, point to a possible final BTC shakeout toward $54,000

item.title: Proposed Ethereum Standard Aims to Help AI Agents Execute Complex DeFi Trades
item.description: The proposed Ethereum ERC-8211 standard would allow complex, multi-step blockchain actions to run in one transaction.

item.title: Crypto's $224 million inflow rebound was led by mostly one country and XRP
item.description: Switzerland accounted for 70% of global crypto ETP inflows last week with XRP products contributing more than half the total.

item.title: Ether treasuries need liquid staking edge to beat ETFs, says Lido exec
item.description: Lido’s institutional lead argues that more crypto treasury companies will need to incorporate liquid staking to outperform the returns generated by staked Ether ETFs.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: index drops 2.4% as all constituents trade lower
item.description: Aave (AAVE) dropped 8.5% and Avalanche (AVAX) fell 7.6%, leading the index lower from Monday.

item.title: Devs Are Making Claude Talk Like a Caveman to Cut Costs—And It Works
item.description: A Reddit post claiming 75% output token savings sparked 400 comments and multiple GitHub repos dedicated to making AI grunt its way to efficiency.

item.title: 'A whole civilization will die': Crypto markets under pressure as Trump ups rhetoric towards Iran
item.description: Weekend gains for bitcoin have been mostly erased ahead of the president's Tuesday night deadline for the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz

item.title: $11.4B Lost to Crypto Scams in 2025: FBI Internet Crime Report
item.description: Older Americans bore nearly 40% of all crypto fraud losses in 2025, as investment scams and crypto ATM fraud ran rampant.

item.title: Bitcoin quantum threat is real and closer than it looks, says Nobel prize winning physicist
item.description: Former Google quantum hardware leader and winner of the 2025 Nobel Prize in Physics, John Martinis, warns that breaking encryption will be among the earliest uses of quantum computing

item.title: South Korea orders crypto exchanges to verify holdings every 5 minutes
item.description: An inspection found slow reconciliation cycles and weak trade-halting systems across major crypto exchanges.

item.title: XRP price risks drop to $1.10 as supply in profit drops to 17-month lows
item.description: XRP’s profitable supply fell to 43% as high capitulation and a bearish chart setup signaled a potential drop toward $1.10 in the coming weeks.

item.title: How North Korea's 6-month long secret espionage program has crypto community rethinking security
item.description: For years, the DeFi industry has treated security as a technical problem: something that could be solved with better code. But the Drift incident suggests something far more complex: that the real vulnerabilities may lie outside the codeba…

item.title: Inside Operation Atlantic’s push to disrupt crypto scams in real time
item.description: Operation Atlantic is a cross-border law enforcement effort to detect and disrupt crypto scams in real time, targeting approval phishing before funds are fully drained.

item.title: Morning Minute: Ceasefire Hopes Rise, Fall Along with Bitcoin
item.description: Bitcoin rose and fell alongside ceasefire hopes. Strategy and Tom Lee kept buying size. And Polymarket may be building its own financial system.

item.title: Binance adds spot trading guardrails to limit abnormal executions
item.description: Binance said it will roll out a spot trading rule on April 14, restricting executions outside a set range during periods of volatility and thin liquidity.

item.title: Bitcoin Whale Moves $20M to Binance Amid Broader Selling Pressure
item.description: A Bitcoin whale transferred 300 BTC worth over $20 million to Binance Tuesday, potentially facing a $15 million loss.

item.title: Why Michael Saylor's bitcoin buys aren’t moving the needle anymore
item.description: Despite billions in purchases, MSTR demand is being outweighed by long term holder positioning and broader capital flows.

item.title: Crypto ETP inflows hit $224M as XRP leads weekly inflows
item.description: Crypto ETPs drew $224 million in inflows last week as XRP led gains, while US ETFs lagged and Ether posted outflows amid mixed macro data and policy expectations.

item.title: Argentine banks testing JPMorgan’s JPM Coin to speed up settlements: Report
item.description: Argentine lenders are reportedly testing JPMorgan’s JPM Coin to improve settlement speed and efficiency, even as the central bank maintains restrictions on crypto services.

item.title: Bitcoin briefly touches $70,000 as ETF inflows signal institutional interest
item.description: Your day-ahead look for April 7, 2026

item.title: If Bitcoin ends 2026 at $10,000, it will still be the best-performing asset over ten years. I'm sure @saylor will rely on that to keep pumping Bitcoin and issuing more shares of $MSTR to buy it. But a 92% decline will make it the worst-performing investment for mo - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE11ZFVIWEJwX0VNRkN0WEo3dDBMT2VtU2ZpNW1TR0NJYUJKaU9SS2U4MGNJV1NoNkJnZV9ETEM2LTlqMFB4OXFMak5zTFk4NUozNW9teG4wWTI2cTlzeDVEa3N3?oc=5" target="_blank">If Bitcoin ends 2026 at $10,000, i…

item.title: Bitcoin price-drop speculation spurred by familiar price pattern
item.description: BTC and ETH remain stuck in a two-month range as oil prices and Iran tensions weigh on sentiment, while AI and privacy tokens show surprising relative strength.

item.title: Solana Foundation unveils security overhaul days after $270 million Drift exploit
item.description: The program includes 24/7 threat monitoring for protocols with more than $10 million in deposits and a dedicated incident response network of security firms.

item.title: Bitcoin pulls away from software stocks as Iran war, AI reshape market dynamic
item.description: BTC correlation with an ETF tracking software comany stocks broke sharply from near-total alignment to near zero after the conflict started.

item.title: Bitcoin RSI ‘nearly perfectly’ copying end of 2022 bear market: Analysis
item.description: Bitcoin stochastic RSI signals led a trader to draw key comparisons between current BTC price action and its rebound after the 2022 bear market.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs Add $471M in Biggest One-Day Haul Since February
item.description: Bitcoin ETFs saw their biggest inflow in six weeks as crypto investors positioned ahead of Trump's Iran deadline.

item.title: Football. Crypto. Same energy. Millions watching. Millions building. Team Up With Binance 🟡⚽ Find out more 👉🏻 binance.com/en/blog/market… - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE1CZUhQcF9vbFZyUGI0dkhuWHNFZGZadlZqRVZraWhOY2hoSXlTNmx0SEVjUjJSSTBBZWU3UjExdjgwd2tNbDhvVllhdFE4ZlJhLS1fUVZZckhGNV9Q?oc=5" target="_blank">Football. Crypto. Same energy. Millions wa…

item.title: Bitcoin ETF inflows hit $471M, highest since late February
item.description: Spot Bitcoin ETFs draw $471 million in their strongest daily inflow in weeks, while Ether funds return to gains despite cautious sentiment.

item.title: “Just one more trade” is the crypto version of “just one more level” in a video game at 2am. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiV0FVX3lxTE8zZVBMa0EwcERGYnBtbkM0c1ZXdmdoa25PMmwyaWRpM3hPSHRIUmg5M1Q0WDRWZlRZMnVWR093b2VUYkhNWkMtNW5TVkp5LVVISTl1SmhHYw?oc=5" target="_blank">“Just one more trade” is the crypto version of “…
